metadata.author: Ejentum
metadata.description: Library of 679 cognitive operations across four harnesses (reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory), each operation engineered in two layers: a natural-language procedure plus an executable reasoning topology (graph DAG with gates, parallel branches, and meta-cognitive exits). The agent ingests both layers before responding. Exposed to AutoGen Studio as a single McpWorkbench wrapping the ejentum-mcp stdio MCP server.

workbenches.description: Ejentum Reasoning Harness via MCP. The agent calls harness_reasoning, harness_code, harness_anti_deception, or harness_memory; each call retrieves a task-matched cognitive operation from a library of 679, engineered in two layers (natural-language procedure plus executable reasoning topology). Hardens reasoning against decay on complex tasks and long agent loops. Requires EJENTUM_API_KEY (free tier 100 calls, no card, at https://ejentum.com/pricing).
workbenches.label: Ejentum Reasoning Harness
